channel.title: Programs on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts
channel.description: Recent content in Programs on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts

item.title: Boxing
item.description: The Sweet Science Boxing Footwork, combinations, and conditioning — private sessions available every day. The Program Build your hands Boxing at KMA focuses on fundamentals that work — proper stance, footwork, jab-cross combinations, defensive head movement, and ring awareness. Whether you're training for fitness or to fight, you'll build real skills. Our boxing program runs primarily through private one-on-one sessions, available every day during gym hours. This means you get full attention from your coach, working at your pace on what matters most for your development.

item.title: Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
item.description: Team Fabricio Philippines Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Gi & No-Gi training for all levels — from your first class to competition prep. Our Core Program The art of ground fighting BJJ is the foundation of KMA. Since day one, our mats have been home to practitioners of all levels — from complete beginners learning their first guard pass to black belts sharpening their competition game. We offer both Gi and No-Gi classes throughout the week.

item.title: Judo
item.description: The Gentle Way Judo Throws, takedowns, and groundwork — the Olympic martial art that complements every grappler's game. The Program Master the art of throwing Judo at KMA is taught by Stephen Kamphuis, who holds a 2nd Degree Judo black belt and was an Oceania Judo Champion before discovering BJJ. His deep understanding of both arts means you'll learn throws and takedowns that work in competition and on the street.

item.title: Muay Thai
item.description: Striking Arts Muay Thai The art of eight limbs — punches, kicks, elbows, and knees. Private and group training available. The Program Complete striking training Our Muay Thai program covers the full range of Thai boxing — from basic stance and footwork to advanced combinations using punches, kicks, elbows, and knees. Training includes pad work, bag work, clinch practice, and conditioning. Whether you're training for fitness, self-defense, or competition, our coaches tailor the sessions to your goals.
